title: Billions
writer: Charles Bryant, Henry Dupuis-Mazuel, Jean-José Frappa
actors: Alla Nazimova, Charles Bryant, William Irving
plot: Princess Triloff, an emigrée from Czarist Russia, escapes to America where she becomes a patron of the arts. She falls in love with the verses of impoverished poet Owen Carey and becomes his anonymous benefactor. When Owen inherit...
